channel.title: IPcuria – CJEU IP case law
channel.description: Latest CJEU IP case law: preliminary rulings, referrals, appeals (via IPcuria)

item.title: [Ruling] C-649/23 (Institutul G. Călinescu)
item.description: [Ruling] 19 Mar 2026, C-649/23 (Institutul G. Călinescu) Type: Judgment - Copyright > InfoSoc Directive > Article 2 - Reproduction right IPcuria: https://ipcuria.eu/case?reference=C-649/23 CURIA: https://curia.europa.eu/juris/liste.do?num=C-649/23

item.title: [Ruling] C-526/24 (Brillen Rottler)
item.description: [Ruling] 19 Mar 2026, C-526/24 (Brillen Rottler) Type: Judgment - Personal Data Protection > General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) > Article 15 - Right of access by the data subject - Personal Data Protection > General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) > Article 82 - Right to compensation and liability - Personal Data Protection > General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) > Article 12 Transparent information, communication and modalities for the exercise of the rights of the data subject IPcuria: https://ipcuria.eu/case?reference=C-526/24 CURIA: https://curia.europa.eu/juris/liste.do?num=C-526/24

item.title: [Ruling] C-371/24 (Comdribus)
item.description: [Ruling] 19 Mar 2026, C-371/24 (Comdribus) Type: Judgment - Personal Data Protection > Law Enforcement Directive (LED) IPcuria: https://ipcuria.eu/case?reference=C-371/24 CURIA: https://curia.europa.eu/juris/liste.do?num=C-371/24
